note: Repo is a React Native / Expo app (mobile/), not a DOM component library. Components depend on react-native primitives + native Expo modules (expo-blur, expo-linear-gradient, @expo/vector-icons) and app providers (AuthContext, ThemeContext), so they cannot render in claude.ai/design. User scoped this sync to tokens/theme only, sourced from mobile/src/lib/theme.ts.
